summary: First test pass for Ringvitation Premium. Backend: 22/22 pytest tests passed (public invitation fetch, RSVP, wishes, visit, auth/login+me, admin dashboard, admin CRUD for invitations/guests/stories/gallery/gifts, rsvps & wishes moderation, 401 on missing/invalid token, invitation update). Frontend public: cover screen renders guest name from ?untuk, 'Buka Undangan' opens content, countdown renders, music & WhatsApp buttons clickable, RSVP form submits successfully + wish appears in list, gallery lightbox opens, all 4 templates (elegant/luxury/modern/minimalist) apply the matching theme-{name} CSS class. Admin: login works with seeded admin@ringvitation.com/admin123, dashboard shows 5 stat cards + 2 charts (Bar+Pie), sidebar navigation works to all 8 pages, Guests page add+CSV export buttons present and add persists, Templates 'Gunakan' switches active template and reflects in public page.

ui_bugs.issue: navigator.clipboard.writeText is called without try/catch. In iframe/preview context the browser denies clipboard write and the unhandled rejection triggers CRA red 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay that blocks subsequent UI interaction. Reproduce: open /ahnaf-nabilla?untuk=Test, click any 'Salin' (copy) bank button.

Edit/Open/Delete are icon-only buttons with no data-testid and no text label, so a user/test cannot find 'Edit' by name. Add data-testid='invitation-edit-{slug}' (or text label) to the pencil button so the edit modal flow is testable. Modal contents not verified due to inability to reliably target the icon.
ui_bugs.selector: button (icon only, no testid) in Invitations table Aksi column

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking inside the lightbox (on the image) appeared not to close it within 300ms. The click handler is on the outer div (onClick=>setLightbox(null)) and click does bubble, so most likely AnimatePresence exit animation keeps the DOM mounted briefly — but worth verifying that clicking on the image (not just the backdrop) closes the lightbox, and consider adding stopPropagation/explicit close button wiring.

issues: React dev warning: <span> rendered inside <option> (hydration warning). Coming from instrumentation but indicates a select option contains a child element wrapper — verify <option> only renders raw text in Templates.jsx (line ~36).

action_items: Wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText in try/catch with document.execCommand('copy') fallback in InvitationPage.jsx copy() (line 476-477) so the red Uncaught runtime errors overlay never appears.
Add data-testid (and ideally a visible 'Edit' label/tooltip) to the pencil/edit icon button in /admin/invitations row actions so the Edit modal flow is testable per the spec.
Verify Templates.jsx <option> only contains plain text — current dev console flags '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PUT /admin/invitations/{slug} updates by old slug but then reads back by payload.slug — if a slug rename is attempted the read-back returns None. Either disallow slug change or update by old slug and refetch by new slug only after confirming uniqueness.

server.py admin endpoints rely solely on get_current_user without role check. Anyone with a valid JWT (including self-registered via /api/auth/register which auto-assigns role='admin') gains admin access — /api/auth/register should be removed in production or gated.
InvitationPage.copy() — missing try/catch around navigator.clipboard.writeText (covered above).
InvitationPage.jsx is large; consider splitting Hero/Story/Gallery/RSVP/Wishes/Gift sections into separate components for maintainability.
Backend uses @app.on_event startup/shutdown which is deprecated in modern FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (1 HIGH bug: clipboard error overlay; 1 MEDIUM: missing testid on edit icon; 1 LOW: lightbox close timing)

test_credentials: admin@ringvitation.com / admin123 (seeded automatically by backend startup). Public slug: ahnaf-nabilla. Cover URL: /ahnaf-nabilla?untuk=Bpk.%20Rizky
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Auto-seed on backend startup created 1 invitation, 4 stories, 8 gallery items, 2 gifts, 5 sample guests, 3 wishes. Test runs added a few TEST_-prefixed RSVP/wish/guest rows (small, can be cleaned manually).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Re-test focus after fixes: (1) click bank copy button on /ahnaf-nabilla and confirm NO red error overlay appears; (2) once data-testid is added to Edit pencil, verify the modal opens, fields are populated (groom_full_name, bride_full_name, akad_*, resepsi_*, etc.), 'Simpan' PUTs to /api/admin/invitations/ahnaf-nabilla and the row reflects the change; (3) bulk import multi-line names on /admin/guests was not exercised in UI — verify it; (4) re-confirm lightbox closes on any click within it.
rca of the issue: ClipboardError: copy() calls navigator.clipboard.writeText() directly. In sandboxed preview/iframe contexts the Permissions API blocks clipboard-write and the returned Promise rejects with NotAllowedError. Because the result is not awaited and there is no .catch(), React's CRA dev overlay catches the unhandledrejection and renders the red 'Uncaught runtime errors' panel over the page. Mitigation: const copy = async (t) => { try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(t); toast({title:'Disalin'}); } catch { /* fallback execCommand or just toast */ } };
